title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi insurance, rebuilt a trillion-dollar industry from the ground up by challenging legacy assumptions rather than modernizing existing carriers. Their fresh outsider perspective, 2 years of regulatory effort, and relentless execution achieved $108M in Series A funding and projected hundreds of millions in ARR. The narrative emphasizes that pursuing ambitious versions of ideas and building defensible moats through difficulty beats capital alone.
